steps.title: Apply vertex form to find the minimum
steps.content: Recognize this as $p(x) = (x - 0)^2 - 57$ in vertex form $a(x - h)^2 + k$, where the vertex is at $(h, k) = (0, -57)$. Since $a = 1 > 0$, the parabola opens upward, so the vertex is the minimum point. The minimum value of $p(x)$ is $-57$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
